summary: Frontend testing of 'Estilo em Duas Rodas' landing page. All sections render correctly with proper content. Navigation, data-testid attributes, mobile responsiveness all verified.

issues: Large blank space above testimonials section visible when scrolling from benefits

context_for_next_testing_agent: Static landing page fully verified. All sections (Hero, About, Benefits, Testimonials, Purchase, Footer) render with correct content. All 34 data-testid attributes present. Mobile responsive with hamburger toggle (data-testid=mobile-menu-toggle). Nav links have correct hrefs (#about, #benefits, #testimonials, #purchase).
